rewritten_requirements: The system shall check if the inserted card is valid.
The system shall prompt the user to select an amount to withdraw if the card is valid.
The system shall verify the transaction after the user selects an amount.
The system shall return the card to the user once the transaction is completed.
The system shall go out of service and not allow any operation if the machine is not working.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks if the inserted card is valid.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the card is valid, the user is prompted to select an amount to withdraw.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system verifies the transaction after the user selects an amount.
Once the transaction is completed, the ATM returns the card to the user.
